name: create_item
description: Create a new item on a Monday.com board. You can specify the group, column values, and the item name. Column values must be passed as a JSON string matching Monday's column value format. The item appears immediately on the board.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL mutation string to create an item.
parameters.example: mutation { create_item (board_id: 1234567890, group_id: "new_group", item_name: "New task", column_values: "{}") { id name } }

parameters.name: board_id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the board to create the item on.

parameters.name: item_name
parameters.description: The name of the new item.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the group to place the item in. If omitted, uses the first group.

parameters.name: column_values
parameters.description: A JSON string of column values to set. Keys are column IDs, values follow Monday's column value format.

body.query: mutation { create_item (board_id: 1234567890, group_id: "new_group", item_name: "Implement user authentication", column_values: "{\"status\":{\"index\":0},\"date4\":{\"date\":\"2024-02-15\"}}") { id name created_at column_values { id text } } }
